params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an Ethernet MAC controller with two states: RECEIVE and STOP. In the RECEIVE state, the controller waits for a packet to receive. When a packet is received, it transitions to the STOP state, where it stops processing. After stopping, it should return to the RECEIVE state. The inputs will be `stop_receive` (to initiate receiving) and `rx_ready` (to indicate reception is ready). The output will be `state` (current state of the MAC controller).
